results.title: Scary Movie 6 Plummets With One Of History’s Worst Box Office Drops
results.description: 2026's Scary Movie, which is the sixth installment in the horror parody franchise, suffers from a record-breaking box office drop in week 2.

results.title: Abrar Qazi Discusses New Show and Social Issues Ahead of Premiere
results.description: Abrar Qazi is gearing up for the launch of his new show 'Tu Hi Re Dil Mein' on Zee TV. In an exclusive interview, he addressed the recent Rs 370 biryani controversy involving comedian Pranit More, emphasizing the importance of respect for women. Abrar also shared his views on relationship red and green flags, advocating for equality and empathy. As excitement builds for his show, Abrar's powerful messages resonate with the youth, urging them to foster a culture of dignity and respect.
